city-overview.description: Aerial cityscape overview — wide-angle dense urban grid

degraded-film.description: Degraded film scan texture — heavy grain and emulsion noise, used as a Screen-blended overlay

evening-landscape.description: Evening landscape photo, portrait orientation — used for glow and damaged-film demos

foil-texture.description: Holographic foil texture — colorful iridescent surface used as a Luminosity-blended overlay

golden-hour-portrait.description: Golden-hour portrait, warm side-lit subject — used for LUT grading and pop-art demos

headshot.description: Studio headshot — bearded male subject on neutral grey backdrop, the most-reused source across demos

light-leak.description: Light-leak overlay — warm-toned analog film leak, Screen-blended in damaged-film demos

mark.description: Matt's personal hexagon-with-circle-and-diamond brand mark, used as a vector overlay on the concrete-wall demo
mark.license: CC0 (Matt Cross — used with permission for pictel demo corpus)

orange-and-blue-lut.description: Orange-and-Teal cinematic colour grade — 33-point 3D CubeLUT authored in Photon 3D ColorGrading

pencil-texture.description: Pencil-stroke paper texture — used as a Multiply-blended overlay in the pencil-sketch demo

portrait-with-background-1.description: Portrait with environmental background — used for the line-drawing demo

portrait-with-background-2.description: Portrait with environmental background — used as the input to the background-replace demo

wall.description: Rough concrete-wall texture — used as the base layer for the SVG-on-concrete demo
